message:
feat: Add CallableReturnKind for accurate callable type inference

Enhances the type system to track return type behavior for callables:
- Add CallableReturnKind enum (same_as_input, fixed_string, fixed_int, etc.)
- Update .callable type to carry return kind info
- pow, abs, min, max, operator.pow use same_as_input (return type matches arg)
- str, repr, format use fixed_string
- len, ord, hash use fixed_int
- bool, all, any use fixed_bool

This fixes type mismatches when iterating over callable tuples like
(pow, operator.pow) - the loop variable now correctly infers float
return type when called with float arguments.

Also excludes callables from type annotation in assignment codegen
since operator.mod, operator.pow etc. are different struct types.
